stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Consider the instrument displays shown in the annex. Which of the following statements is true?

options.a: If turning 90° to the left, the QDM will be 000°.
options.b: If turning 90° to the left, the QDM will be 030°.
options.c: If maintaining the heading of 120°, the QDM will continuously increase.
options.d: If maintaining the heading of 120°, the QDM will remain 270°.
